channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
item.description: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.

item.title: Samsung strike involving 47,000 workers looms as South Korea’s president urges labor deal
item.description: South Korea’s government stepped up pressure on Samsung Electronics and its union to avert a strike that officials say could cost the economy billions.

item.title: High energy prices could derail Europe’s AI race with U.S. and China
item.description: Energy costs vary widely across Europe, creating clear winners and losers in attracting investment.

item.title: Treasury yields rise amid global bond rout as inflation fears grip investors
item.description: Global bond yields rose on Monday as fears of resurgent inflation grip financial markets.

item.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
item.description: The search for HALO stocks is a hot theme in the stock market. There is now an ETF to invest in it.

item.title: G7 finance ministers to meet amid warning of economic consequences of prolonged Strait of Hormuz closure
item.description: G7 finance ministers are due to meet in Paris on Monday and Tuesday as long-term borrowing costs surge.

item.title: These ‘underappreciated winners of AI’ also pay solid income
item.description: These real estate investment trusts offer exposure to artificial intelligence. Wall Street sees upside ahead.

item.title: Novo Nordisk’s next obesity battlefront: Winning beyond America
item.description: The weight loss pill had a strong U.S. launch this year, and Novo believes that will be replicated in other markets around the world.

item.title: Why a small UK lender has major U.S. credit firms on edge
item.description: The continuing fallout from MFS' collapse has heightened fears that problems in complex credit markets pose a broader systemic risk.

item.title: Ryanair has plans for 'armageddon' scenario as CFO warns weaker European carriers may not survive jet fuel crunch
item.description: Ryanair said it has plans for an "armageddon situation," amid the jet fuel crisis.

item.title: Americans are leaving the U.S. in record numbers and spending hundreds to learn how to do it
item.description: Expatsi's "Move Abroad Con" attracted hundreds of Americans hoping to move overseas.

item.title: Meet the pilots flying Spirit Airlines' yellow jets to the desert
item.description: Special pilots have been moving Spirit's fleet of yellow jets to the desert.

item.title: European markets slide after Trump threatens Iran
item.description: European stocks start the new trading week in negative territory as investors react to the latest developments in the U.S.-Iran war.

item.title: China's economy loses steam in April as retail sales hit 40-month low
item.description: China's economy stumbled in April with consumption, industrial output and investment growth missing expectations.

item.title: South Korea market volatility nears record high after $13 billion foreign investor selloff
item.description: South Korea's stock market volatility surged near record highs on Monday after foreign investors dumped $13.2 billion worth of local equities last week.

item.title: Trump warns Iran to 'get moving' or 'there won’t be anything left'
item.description: The president has previously threatened to strike civilian infrastructure in Iran, a potential war crime.

item.title: Mizuho shares slide 7% after denying decision on reported Rakuten Bank investment shift
item.description: Shares of Mizuho Financial Group fell over 7% Monday, after the company said it has not made decision yet on investment in Rakuten Bank.

item.title: Oil jumps as Trump warns 'Clock is Ticking' for Iran, fanning fears of escalation in conflict
item.description: Trump's warning to Iran over the weekend signals that the impasse between Washington and Tehran over ending the war could deteriorate into resumption of armed conflict.

item.title: Asia-Pacific markets mostly fall as Trump’s Iran warning stokes fresh oil supply fears
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets fell as investors weighed renewed geopolitical tensions after Donald Trump warned Iran to "get moving, FAST."

item.title: UAE and Saudi Arabia report drone incidents as Iran war deadlock drags on
item.description: A drone strike caused a fire at a nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates, officials said Sunday, while Saudi Arabia reported intercepting three drones.

item.title: With the Long Island Rail Road shut down, New York governor urges unions to resume talks
item.description: The railroad closed down and workers went on strike just after midnight Friday, after five unions representing about half its workforce walked off the job.

item.title: How to plan a trip for medical tourism and the best resources
item.description: If you're seeking a medical procedure abroad, these resources can help.

item.title: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

item.title: Trump touted Palantir on Truth Social after buying the company's stock, records show
item.description: During the first three months of the year, Trump purchased between $630,000 and $247,008 worth of Palantir stock and sold at least $1.1 million.

item.title: Why your 'fixed' mortgage payment keeps going up
item.description: Rising property taxes and surging homeowners insurance costs are pushing up the amount that homeowners must pay monthly alongside their mortgage.

item.title: AI's insatiable appetite for electricity could revive a forsaken energy source
item.description: President Trump and Energy Secretary Chris Wright are working hard to keep coal alive as part of a robust grid.

item.title: AI-related layoffs a boost for stocks? Not necessarily
item.description: The data underscores an uncomfortable reality.

item.title: The bond market is flashing a warning over Iran. A veteran of energy geopolitics explains the risk
item.description: Daleep Singh knows how energy and markets intersect. He sees trouble ahead.

item.title: Russia's Putin to meet China's Xi in Beijing from May 19-20, Beijing and Moscow say
item.description: Putin's trip follows shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing.

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
item.description: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.
